name: Matrix Composites & Engineering Ltd
description: Matrix Composites & Engineering Ltd is an industry leader in the development and manufacturing of advanced composite materials, syntactic foam, and subsea buoyancy solutions. Established in 1999 and headquartered in Henderson, Western Australia, the company operates the largest composites manufacturing facility in the country. Matrix provides complete turnkey solutions for the energy, resources, and infrastructure sectors, supported by a global network with offices in Australia and the United States. The company is dedicated to delivering high-performance engineering products and localised customer support to clients worldwide.
